role_summary: the direct tax manager oversees direct tax compliance, planning, and litigation support to  manage tax risks effectively.
responsibilities: • manage corporate income tax compl iance and filings   • develop and implement tax planning strategies   • handle tax assessments, scrutiny, and appeals   • review advance tax and withholding tax calculations   • monitor changes in tax laws and assess impact   • coordinate with external tax advisors and audito rs
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong expertise in income tax act and corporate taxation   • strategic tax planning and risk management skills
